name: Sloppy Joes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Celery with leaves, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt to the meat.
2. Turn the meat into a large dry, cold frying pan.
3. Stir over medium heat with a large kitchen fork (not a spoon) until the meat changes color all over and pours off any liquid fat as it collects.
4. Add onion, celery, and green pepper. Stir and cook 1-2 minutes.
5. Combine all remaining ingredients; add to meat and mix well.
6. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat to low, and let simmer gently for 15-20 minutes, stirring frequently until cooked and well mixed.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 MEDIUM-FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE. When served on WHOLE HAMBURGER BUN, ADD 2 STARCH EXCHANGES; CAL: 165; CHO: 4g; PRO: 15g; FAT: 9g; SOD: 589; CHO: 47mg; Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use low-sodium Tabasco and unsalted beef broth, Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S, and Katharine Middleton
